10300.name: Dead End Butcher
desc: • When not in a Stunned state, Boss enemies gain 1 stack of All or Nothing every 6s, stacking up to 3 stacks. Each stack of All or Nothing increases the damage dealt by the Boss enemy by 10%. When an Agent's attack hits an enemy, the Agent's CRIT DMG increases by 25% for each stack of All or Nothing the target has. All or Nothing stacks will be reset when the enemy recovers from being Stunned.

• When the Agent hits the boss enemy with a Defensive Assist or Chain Attack, they apply 1 stack of Weakening to the target, lasting 20s. The duration of each stack is calculated separately. For each stack of Weakening on the target, Agent CRIT DMG is increased by 15%. When the boss enemy has 4 stacks of Weakening, Defensive Assist will deflect the boss enemy's attack, causing a Stagger effect.
perf: • Successfully triggering Perfect Dodge grants 150 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.
• Successfully triggering Perfect Assist grants 300 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.

10304.name: Unknown Corruption Complex
desc: • When dealing sufficient DMG to the boss enemy's legs, IMPAIRED!! will be triggered. Upon successfully breaking the boss enemy's legs, the Agent restores 1000 Decibels, and the boss gains 1 stack of Disintegration for 20 seconds, up to a maximum of 4 stacks. When the Agent's attacks hit an enemy, for each stack of Disintegration the target has, CRIT DMG is increased by 25%.
perf: • Successfully impairing an enemy grants 800 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.

12300.name: Corrupted Overlord: Pompey
desc: • Boss enemies gain 1 stack of Battle-Hardened every 10s, increasing their DMG dealt by 20% and stacking up to 3 times. When inflicting Attribute Anomaly, removes 1 stack of Battle-Hardened and increases their DMG taken by 15% for 20s.

• Boss enemies gain 1 stack of Battle-Hardened every 10s, increasing their DMG dealt by 20% and stacking up to 3 times. When inflicting Attribute Anomaly, removes 1 stack of Battle-Hardened and increases their DMG taken by 15% for 20s.
perf: • Successfully inflicting Attribute Anomaly on enemies grants 150 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.
• Successfully triggering Perfect Dodge grants 200 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.

14300.name: Notorious: Marionette
desc: • DMG dealt by Boss enemies increases by 25%. When a clone is destroyed or when the main body is Stunned, 1/5 stacks of On Thin Ice is inflicted on Boss enemies respectively. Each stack of On Thin Ice decreases the DMG dealt by the Boss by 5% and increases the Ice DMG and Electric DMG dealt to the Boss by Agents by 10%. On Thin Ice stacks will be reset when the enemy recovers from Stun.

• DMG dealt by Boss enemies increases by 25%. When a clone is destroyed or when the main body is Stunned, 1/5 stacks of On Thin Ice is inflicted on Boss enemies respectively. Each stack of On Thin Ice decreases the DMG dealt by the Boss by 5% and increases the Ice DMG and Ether DMG dealt to the Boss by Agents by 10%. On Thin Ice stacks will be reset when the enemy recovers from Stun.
perf: • Successfully destroying a dance partner grants 200 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.
• Successfully destroying a dance partner grants 200 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.

14301.name: Notorious: Pompey
desc: • When not in a Stunned state, Boss enemies gain 1 stack of All or Nothing every 6s, stacking up to 3 stacks. Each stack of All or Nothing increases the damage dealt by the Boss enemy by 10%. When an Agent's attack hits an enemy, the Agent's CRIT DMG increases by 25% for each stack of All or Nothing the target has. All or Nothing stacks will be reset when the enemy recovers from being Stunned.

• When the Agent hits the boss enemy with a Defensive Assist or Chain Attack, they apply 1 stack of Weakening to the target, lasting 20s. The duration of each stack is calculated separately. For each stack of Weakening on the target, Agent CRIT DMG is increased by 15%.
  • When the boss enemy has 4 stacks of Weakening, Defensive Assist will deflect the boss enemy's attack, causing a Stagger effect.

• When the Agent hits the boss enemy with a Defensive Assist or Chain Attack, they apply 1 stack of Weakening to the target, lasting 20s. The duration of each stack is calculated separately. For each stack of Weakening on the target, Agent CRIT DMG is increased by 15%.
  • When the boss enemy has 4 stacks of Weakening, Defensive Assist will deflect the boss enemy's attack, causing a Stagger effect.
  • Boss Anomaly DMG taken is reduced by 30%.
perf: • Successfully triggering Perfect Dodge grants 200 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.
• Successfully triggering a Perfect Assist grants 350 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.
• Successfully triggering a Perfect Assist grants 350 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.

14302.name: Sacrifice: Bringer
desc: • When inflicting an Attribute Anomaly or Disorder on a boss enemy, all squad members gain Laser Focus, which stacks up to 6 times. Each stack of Laser Focus increases the agent's CRIT Rate by 5%. When having at least 3 stacks of Laser Focus, inflicting an Attribute Anomaly will increase its duration by 5s. When Sacrifice: Bringer attacks with his Sacrificial Knife, all squad members' Laser Focus stacks will be reset.

• When inflicting an Attribute Anomaly or Disorder on a boss enemy, all squad members gain 1 stack of Laser Focus, stacking up to 6 times. Each stack of Laser Focus increases the Agent's ATK by 8%. With at least 3 stacks of Laser Focus, inflicting an Attribute Anomaly will increase its duration by 5s. When Sacrifice: Bringer attacks with his Sacrificial Knife, all squad members' Laser Focus stacks will be reset.
perf: • Successfully interrupting a chant grants 2000 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.
• Successfully interrupting a chant grants 2000 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.

14303.name: Typhon Destroyer
desc: • Agents inflict Overwhelmed when landing a Defensive Assist hit against a Boss enemy, and 3 stacks of Overwhelmed when accumulating 3 Defensive Assist hits and triggering IMPAIRED!!. Each stack of Overwhelmed increases Daze by 15%, and Chain Attack and Ultimate DMG taken while Stunned by 10%. The enemy will fix the impaired parts and reset the impairment level while charging, and will reset its Overwhelmed stacks after recovering from Stun.

• Agents inflict Overwhelmed when landing a Defensive Assist hit against a Boss enemy, and 3 stacks of Overwhelmed when accumulating 3 Defensive Assist hits and triggering IMPAIRED!!. Each stack of Overwhelmed increases Daze by 15%, and Chain Attack and Ultimate DMG taken while Stunned by 10%. The enemy will fix the impaired parts and reset the impairment level while charging, and will reset its Overwhelmed stacks after recovering from Stun.
perf: • Successfully impairing an enemy grants 600 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.

• Successfully triggering a Perfect Assist grants 200 Performance Points.
  • Successfully causing IMPAIRED!! grants 600 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.
14303.misc: • Assist Points are not consumed for this battle.

15300.name: Notorious: Dead End Butcher
desc: • DMG dealt to boss enemies by Attribute Anomaly is increased by 50%. While Notorious: Dead End Butcher is in Ether Enhanced state, the DMG it takes is reduced by 15%, and the Daze value dealt by Agents to it is reduced by 30%. Triggering Disorder on Notorious: Dead End Butcher immediately forces it to exit the Ether Enhanced state.

• DMG dealt to boss enemies by Attribute Anomaly is increased by 50%. While Notorious: Dead End Butcher is in Ether Enhanced state, the DMG it takes is reduced by 15%, and the Daze value dealt by Agents to it is reduced by 30%. Triggering Disorder on Notorious: Dead End Butcher immediately forces it to exit the Ether Enhanced state.

• DMG dealt to boss enemies by Attribute Anomaly is increased by 50%. While Notorious: Dead End Butcher is in Ether Enhanced state, the DMG it takes is reduced by 15%, and the Daze value dealt by Agents to it is reduced by 30%. Triggering Disorder on Notorious: Dead End Butcher immediately forces it to exit the Ether Enhanced state.
perf: • Successfully triggering Perfect Dodge grants 200 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.
• Successfully inflicting Disorder grants 200 Performance Points, up to a maximum of 5000.
• Successfully inflicting Disorder grants 300 Performance Points, up to a maximum of 5000.

20300.name: Miasma Priest
desc: • When the Miasma Priest switches phase, their Anomaly Buildup RES increases by 10% and CRIT DMG taken increases by 30%. This effect can stack up to 2 times and is cleared when Miasmic Shield breaks.
perf: • When an Agent successfully performs 3 Defensive Assists within 3 seconds, earn 1000 Performance Points. A maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be obtained.

21300.name: Miasmic Fiend: Unfathomable
desc: • When Miasmic Fiend is affected by Attribute Anomaly, it takes 8% bonus Anomaly DMG from Agents, stacking up to 6 times; activating Miasmic Shield clears all stacks, with each stack increasing the reduction efficiency of Miasmic Shield by 2.5%.
perf: • When Agents bait Miasmic Fiend's ground attack into detonating at least 5 Miasma Pools at once and avoid being hit by the attack and pool explosions, they will earn 1700 Performance Points, up to a maximum of 5000.

22300.name: The Defiler
desc:
• When an Agent hits The Defiler with Defensive Assist, the whole squad gains 1 stack of Adjudication; when an Agent knocks down The Defiler attacking in mid-air, the whole squad gains 4 stacks of Adjudication. Adjudication can stack up to 6 times and lasts for 30 seconds. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
  • For each stack of Adjudication, the Agent's CRIT DMG increases by 8%.
  • The Defiler receives 25% less Attribute Anomaly DMG.

• When an Agent hits The Defiler with Defensive Assist, the whole squad gains 1 stack of Adjudication; when an Agent knocks down The Defiler attacking in mid-air, the whole squad gains 4 stacks of Adjudication. Adjudication can stack up to 6 times and lasts for 30 seconds. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
  • For each stack of Adjudication, the Agent's CRIT DMG increases by 5%, Physical DMG increases by 5%, and Electric DMG increases by 5%.
  • The Defiler receives 25% less Attribute Anomaly DMG.
perf: • When an Agent causes IMPAIRED!! status, they gain 2500 Performance Points; when an Agent shoots down The Defiler while it's attacking in mid-air, they gain 1500 Performance Points, up to a maximum of 5000 Performance Points.

• When an Agent causes IMPAIRED!! status, they gain 2500 Performance Points; when an Agent shoots down The Defiler while it's attacking in mid-air, they gain 1500 Performance Points, up to a maximum of 5000 Performance Points.

23300.name: Wandering Hunter
desc:
• Wandering Hunter's Base DEF increases by 40% in Miasmic Field; when an Agent hits Wandering Hunter with Assist Follow-Up or Dodge Counter, 1 stack of Wavering is applied. Wavering can stack up to 5 times and lasts 15 seconds. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
  • When an Agent's attacks hit Wandering Hunter, for each stack of Wavering, the Agent's Sheer DMG is increased by 7%.
perf: • During the hide-and-seek phase, using Perception Technique to break Drowned Ideal Lucia's true form will grant 3000 Performance Points; Exposing his true form and activating Defensive Assist or Assist Follow-Up against Wandering Hunter will grant 2000 Performance Points, up to a maximum of 5000 points.

24300.name: Ye Shiyuan the Thrall
desc: • When Sobek and The Thrall alternate turns, The Thrall gains 1 stack of Contract and Self-Sacrifice. Contract and Self-Sacrifice can stack up to 3 times. Each stack of Contract increases All-Attribute Anomaly Buildup RES by 15%, each stack of Self-Sacrifice increases The Thrall's Stun DMG Multiplier by 10%. When The Thrall is Stunned, CRIT DMG taken increases by 50%.

• When Sobek and The Thrall alternate turns, The Thrall gains 1 stack of Contract and Self-Sacrifice. Contract and Self-Sacrifice can stack up to 3 times. Each stack of Contract increases All-Attribute Anomaly Buildup RES by 15%, each stack of Self-Sacrifice reduces The Thrall's DEF by 8%. When The Thrall is Stunned, CRIT DMG taken increases by 50%.
perf: • When Agents inflict Weakened on Sobek and The Thrall, 1500 Performance Points will be awarded. When an Agent eliminates Sobek, 2000 Performance Points will be awarded. Up to a maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be earned.

• When Agents inflict Weakened on Sobek and The Thrall, 1500 Performance Points will be awarded. When an Agent eliminates Sobek, 2000 Performance Points will be awarded. Up to a maximum of 5000 Performance Points can be earned.

25300.name: Primordial Nightmare: "The Creator"
desc: • Boss Anomaly DMG taken is reduced by 30%. When switching from Miasmic Shield state to normal state, or from normal state to Miasmic Shield state, Agent CRIT DMG against them is increased by 20%. This effect can stack up to 3 times and resets when the boss recovers from Stun.
perf: • Triggering PURIFIED!! grants 1000 Performance Points. During the Control Skill, each successful counter against the Boss's attacks grants 500 Performance Points. Performing a SHUTDOWN!! on the Boss's Control Skill grants 2000 Performance Points. Maximum obtainable Performance Points: 5000.

26300.name: Discordant Solo: Vesper
desc: • When Discordant Solo is being attacked, the CRIT DMG of this attack decreases by 40%. When an Agent deploys or extends the duration of Ether Veil in battle, the whole squad gains 1 stack of Sonic Resonance. Sonic Resonance stacks up to 3 times, and each stack increases Anomaly Buildup Rate by 8%, as well as Anomaly DMG by 15%.

• Agent Anomaly Buildup Rate increases by 15%, Anomaly DMG dealt to Discordant Solo increases by 30%, when Agents are in Ether Veil during combat, Discordant Solo's Stun DMG Multiplier increases by 30%.
perf: • During a Control Skill, every successful counter of a Boss attack grants 350 Performance Points. A SHUTDOWN!! of the Boss's Control Skill or counter of the final strike of certain skills inflicts on the Boss the IMPAIRED!! effect and grants 750 Performance Points. Earn up to 5000 Performance Points from the above.

• During a Control Skill, every successful counter of a Boss attack grants 350 Performance Points. A SHUTDOWN!! of the Boss's Control Skill or counter of the final strike of certain skills inflicts on the Boss the IMPAIRED!! effect and grants 750 Performance Points. Earn up to 5000 Performance Points from the above.

27300.name: Sanguine Sweeper
desc: • While Corruptive Barrier is active, Anomaly DMG dealt by Agents is increased by 50%, and Anomaly Buildup is increased by 30%. When the Boss is Stunned, Anomaly DMG taken is increased by 15%, and Anomaly Buildup inflicted by Agents is increased by 15%. When the Boss is not Stunned, DMG taken is reduced by 15%.
perf: • Each successful counter and subsequent trigger of a special stagger against the Boss's attacks grants 1000 Performance Points. During the Control Skill, each successful counter against the Boss's attacks grants 500 Performance Points. Performing a SHUTDOWN!! on the Boss's Control Skill grants 1500 Performance Points. Maximum obtainable Performance Points: 5000.

28300.name: Phaethon of the Scorched Horizon
desc: • After Scorched Horizon activates Gale Scorcher, they gain 5 stacks of Into Flames. Each stack of Into Flames increases DMG dealt by 10% and reduces CRIT DMG taken by 25%. With Into Flames stacks, every time Scorched Horizon is inflicted with an Anomaly, one stack of Into Flames is lost, and subsequent Abloom DMG taken increases by 10% for 15s (max 3 stacks). Repeated triggers reset the duration.
perf: • When Scorched Horizon is in Gale Scorcher state, impairing them grants 1250 Performance Points. Striking down Scorched Horizon when they're attacking in mid-air grants 1500 Performance Points. Performing a SHUTDOWN!! against Scorched Horizon's Control Skill grants 2000 Performance Points. Max 5000 Performance Points.

30300.name: Girtablullu
30300.spoilerDesc:
• When Agents inflict an Attribute Anomaly, apply 1 stack of Fragile, reduce Corruptive Barrier by 20% of its maximum value, and increase Daze by 15% of its maximum value. This effect can trigger once every 15s.
  • Each stack of Fragile increases Attribute Anomaly DMG taken by 7.5% and Vortex DMG taken by an additional 5% for 10s, stacking up to 3 times. When Corruptive Barrier is broken, the boss gains the max Fragile stacks.
  • When the boss is Stunned, all Fragile stacks become Weakened stacks. Each stack of Weakened decreases the boss's Anomaly Buildup RES by 5% and Stun DMG Multiplier by 10%. This effect resets when the boss recovers from Stun.
30300.spoilerPerf: • Each successful counter to BOSS's consecutive slams grants 1000 Performance Points. Performing a Linked Defensive Assist to counter the final slam grants 1000 Performance Points. Breaking a Corruptive Barrier grants 1500 Performance Points. Max 5000 Performance Points.
desc:
• When Agents inflict an Attribute Anomaly, apply 1 stack of Fragile, reduce Corruptive Barrier by 20% of its maximum value, and increase Daze by 15% of its maximum value. This effect can trigger once every 15s.
  • Each stack of Fragile increases Attribute Anomaly DMG taken by 7.5% and Vortex DMG taken by an additional 5% for 10s, stacking up to 3 times. When Corruptive Barrier is broken, the boss gains the max Fragile stacks.
  • When the boss is Stunned, all Fragile stacks become Weakened stacks. Each stack of Weakened decreases the boss's Anomaly Buildup RES by 5% and Stun DMG Multiplier by 10%. This effect resets when the boss recovers from Stun.
perf: • Each successful counter to Girtablullu's consecutive slams grants 1000 Performance Points. Performing a Linked Defensive Assist to counter the final slam grants 1000 Performance Points. Breaking a Corruptive Barrier grants 1500 Performance Points. Max 5000 Performance Points.
